sentence_reviews.text: Sparse events and membrane dynamics encode and process information in continuous or discrete time.

sentence_reviews.text: Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Dynamical systems & control theory, Sequences, events & time series.
